mapper.select: SELECT a.order_status FROM TB_ORDER_MST a, TB_USERS b, TB_ETP_STTS_CD c WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.user_no = b.user_no AND a.order_status = c.etp_stts_cd AND a.order_id = #{orderId} AND c.system_id = #{systemId} AND b.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_type, company_cd FROM TB_USERS WHERE 1=1 AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT system_id, etp_stts_cd FROM TB_ETP_STTS_CD WHERE 1=1 AND seq != 99 AND seq > ( SELECT seq FROM TB_ETP_STTS_CD WHERE 1=1 AND etp_stts_cd = #{currentEtpStatus} ) ORDER BY seq ASC LIMIT 1;
SELECT reject_target_cd FROM TB_ETP_STTS_CD WHERE 1=1 AND etp_stts_cd = #{currentEtpStatus} AND reject_yn = 'Y'
SELECT target_table, target_status_col, target_pk_col FROM TB_ETP_TARGET_TABLE WHERE system_id = #{systemId}

SELECT a.order_id, a.est_id, b.payment_id FROM TB_ORDER_MST a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_PAYMENT_MST b ON a.order_id = b.order_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_USERS c ON a.user_no = c.user_no WHERE 1=1 AND a.order_id = #{orderId} AND c.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT b.fuel_id, b.total_qty FROM TB_ORDER_MST a, TB_CART b WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.order_no = b.order_no AND order_id = #{orderId}
